name: expo-mobile-frontend
description: Reusable Codex plugin for Expo and React Native frontend architecture, UI systems, motion, data runtime, release workflow, and optional Figma design-to-code.

interface.shortDescription: Expo and React Native frontend workflows
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex plugin for Expo and React Native teams. It bundles practical skills for app architecture, NativeWind-based UI systems, motion, data runtime, quality gates, release workflows, and optional Figma design-to-code.
defaultPrompt: Use Expo Mobile Frontend to plan a new Expo feature architecture.
Use Expo Mobile Frontend to build a NativeWind screen with reusable tokens.
Use Expo Mobile Frontend to translate a Figma mobile frame into Expo-ready code.
